queries.feature_definition: Credit history: all previous credits at this bank paid back duly.
queries.question: An empirical analysis investigates the contribution of a credit history with all previous credits at this bank paid back duly to increased credit default probability.
A statistical study examines the impact of loan duration in months on the mitigation of credit risk and reduction of default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Research identifies credit risk drivers associated with a checking account status indicating a balance below zero Deutsche Marks and its contribution to default.
